description.en:
PropertyScout ID [hidden phone]


Fully furnished 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom condo for sale with a floorsize of 49 squaremeters, located on the 21st floor, at The Lofts
Silom building, in the popular Bang Rak district near BTS Surasak and near MRT Sam Yan. Please contact us to schedule a viewing.

Unit amenities:
 * Balcony
 * Microwave
 * Refrigerator
 * Stove
 * TV

Building features:
 * Building completed in 2020
 * Security cameras
 * Covered car park
 * Beautiful garden area on premise
 * Gym
 * 24-hours security
 * Relaxing swimming pool
 * Sauna
 * Gym
 * Kids play area
 * Steam room




Haven’t found a place you love yet?

Our fast, professional, and multilingual team focuses on residential properties for rent and sell across Thailand in Bangkok,
Phuket, Pattaya, Hua Hin, Koh Samui, Chiang Mai and many other locations. We are one of the leading real estate agents in Thailand
and can offer you all available rental and sale units.

Contact us today and let us find you the most suitable home or investment property for a great price - at no cost to you.

description.en: This property is a 78 SqM condo with 2 bedrooms and 1.5 bathroom that is available for sale. It is part of the The Lofts Silom project in Si Lom, Bangkok and was completed in Jun 2020. You can buy this condo for a base price of ฿15,500,000 (฿198,718/SqM).
